import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useAuth } from "../../Context/AuthContext"; import './Settings.css'; import { useEffect } from "react"; function Settings() { const {isAuthenticated, user, theme, setTheme} = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(()=>{ if (!isAuthenticated){ navigate("/"); } }) return ( <>

) }; export default Settings;
